cb_layout: c0:RM_input c5:gamma c6:beta c8:scaler c9:eps c16:tilized c17:output_rm c24:reduce_out c25:centered c27:rstd

description: tilize + untilize identity passthrough - reader writes RM sticks, compute tilizes then untilizes, writer reads RM sticks

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, per-block: reserve Wt pages, read 32 sticks, push Wt pages
tilize c_0->c_16 then untilize c_16->c_17, using helpers with InitAndUninit+WaitBlock defaults, hw_startup with c_0,c_8,c_16
TensorAccessor for RM output sticks, per-block: wait Wt pages, extract 32 sticks, write to DRAM, pop Wt pages
Fixed compute kernel syntax from namespace NAMESPACE/void MAIN to void kernel_main()

description: Add reduce_mean and sub_mean phases. Reader fills scaler CB. Compute: tilize -> reduce_mean -> sub_mean -> untilize centered values from c_25.

approach: Added prepare_reduce_scaler<c_8>(1.0f/W) before main loop for mean reduction scaler
Added Phase 2 reduce_mean (WaitUpfrontNoPop on c_16, SUM REDUCE_ROW) and Phase 3 sub_mean (COL bcast, NoWaitPopAtEnd/WaitUpfrontPopAtEnd). Untilize source changed from c_16 to c_25.

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c8:1/persist c16:Wt_push/Wt_pop(NoPop+PopAtEnd) c24:1/1 c25:Wt/Wt c17:Wt/Wt

description: Add square, reduce_var, eps+rsqrt, mul_rstd phases. Reader fills epsilon CB. Full layer norm without affine.

approach: Added epsilon runtime arg (index 5, bit-cast float), prepare_reduce_scaler<c_9>(epsilon) for epsilon CB fill

reason: Reader needs epsilon as runtime arg to fill c_9 CB

change: Added epsilon param to function signature, bit-cast to uint32 via struct.pack
reason: Epsilon must be passed as uint32 runtime arg to reader kernel

change: Added eps_bits to per-core runtime args list at index 5
reason: Reader kernel reads epsilon at runtime arg index 5

approach: Added Phases 4-7: square(WaitUpfrontNoPop c_25->c_16), reduce_var(BulkWaitBulkPop c_16->c_24), add+rsqrt(SCALAR bcast c_24+c_9->c_27), mul_rstd(COL bcast c_25*c_27->c_16). Untilize source back to c_16.

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c8:1/persist c9:1/persist c16:Wt_reused_3x c24:1/1_reused_2x c25:Wt(NoPop+PopAtEnd) c27:1/1 c17:Wt/Wt

upstream_fixes: Added epsilon to reader runtime args via struct.pack bit-cast

description: Add optional gamma multiplication and beta addition. Reader reads and replicates gamma/beta sticks, compute tilizes them at startup. Full layer norm with affine.

approach: Added gamma/beta reading: read single stick from DRAM, replicate 32x into c_0, push Wt pages for compute to tilize into c_5/c_6. Uses get_noc_addr for DRAM read and L1 local copy.
Fixed gamma/beta DRAM read: use InterleavedAddrGenFast + noc_async_read_tile for page 0, then L1 volatile memcpy for 32x replication into c_0

Added gamma/beta tilize at program start (c_0->c_5, c_0->c_6). Added Phase 8 mul_gamma (NONE bcast, c_16*c_5->c_25) and Phase 9 add_beta (NONE bcast). Untilize source determined by constexpr if (gamma+beta->c_16, gamma_only->c_25, beta_only->c_25, none->c_16).

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt(gamma+beta+blocks) c5:Wt/persist c6:Wt/persist c8:1/persist c9:1/persist c16:reused c24:1/1x2 c25:reused c27:1/1 c17:Wt/Wt
